request_description: Build an agentic workflow that reviews synthetic compliance records, flags issues, drafts remediation tasks, and prepares outbound review packages for approved external counterparties. The agent is expected to take workflow actions against governed systems, route exceptions for human review, and maintain full audit evidence.
target_users: Compliance operations specialists, internal audit coordinators, and governance reviewers
business_goal: Accelerate synthetic compliance case review while preserving oversight, traceability, and approval controls for high-impact operational decisions.
known_constraints: Must comply with Contoso internal data residency policy
missing_information: Confirm which external counterparties may receive generated review packages and what approval workflow governs those releases.
